name: Patient Case
history: Past traumatic incident involving sexual assault by partner Ivan. Ongoing relationship difficulties involving trust and intimacy. Reports some improvement in relationship dynamics with Ivan making efforts to rebuild trust.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I let my guard down, I will be hurt again.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't trust anyone, and I will always be hurt in relationships.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of intimacy and emotional withdrawal.
situation: Ivan touches the patient in a way that reminds her of the past assault.
auto_thought: I can't believe this is happening again; I am not safe.
behavior: Pulling away from Ivan, emotional withdrawal.
